zh.lifeSummary: 當Daniel David Morrison III於1691年8月1日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可紐波利時，他的父親Daniel Morrison Jr24歲，母親Hannah Griffin21歲。他於1715年12月15日與Eleanor Littlefield在美國緬因州約克結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1756年7月24日在美國緬因州約克威爾斯享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Daniel David Morrison III于1691年8月1日出生在美国马萨诸塞州艾可紐波利时，他的父亲Daniel Morrison Jr24岁，母亲Hannah Griffin21岁。他于1715年12月15日与Eleanor Littlefield在美国缅因州約克结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1756年7月24日在美国缅因州約克威爾斯享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Daniel David Morrison III was born on 1 August 1691, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Daniel Morrison Jr, was 24 and his mother, Hannah Griffin, was 21. He married Eleanor Littlefield on 15 December 1715, in York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 24 July 1756, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Daniel David Morrison III est né le 1 août 1691, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Daniel Morrison Jr, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Hannah Griffin, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Littlefield le 15 décembre 1715, à York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1756, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Daniel David Morrison III am 1. August 1691 in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Daniel Morrison Jr 24 und seine Mutter Hannah Griffin 21. Er hat am 15. Dezember 1715 in York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Eleanor Littlefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juli 1756 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel David Morrison III è nato il il 1 agosto 1691 nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Daniel Morrison Jr, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Griffin, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Littlefield il 15 dicembre 1715, nel York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 24 luglio 1756, nel Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Daniel David Morrison IIIが1691年8月1日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスニューブリーで生まれた時，父Daniel Morrison Jrは24歳，母Hannah Griffinは21歳であった。1715年12月15日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークでEleanor Littlefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1756年7月24日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Daniel David Morrison III(이)가 1691년 8월 1일 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 뉴버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Daniel Morrison Jr(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Griffin(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1715년 12월 15일 미국 메인 주 요르크에서 Eleanor Littlefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1756년 7월 24일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel David Morrison III nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1691, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Daniel Morrison Jr, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Griffin, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Littlefield em 15 de dezembro de 1715, em York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1756, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Daniel David Morrison III родился 1 августа 1691 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Daniel Morrison Jr было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah Griffin, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Littlefield 15 декабря 1715 г. в местности ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 24 июля 1756 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Daniel David Morrison III nació el 1 de agosto de 1691, en Newbury, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Daniel Morrison Jr, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Hannah Griffin, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Eleanor Littlefield el 15 de diciembre de 1715, en York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 24 de julio de 1756, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años.
